name: Creamy Chicken Salad with Mango Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring the chicken broth to a boil over high heat. Add the chicken breasts and simmer until cooked through and tender, about 10 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool.
2. Cook the rice in boiling water according to package instructions. Once cooked, drain and set aside to cool.
3. Cut the mangoes into thin strips and finely chop the green onions.
4. In a blender or food processor, combine the mango, light cream, thousand island dressing, mint, and mango chutney. Blend until smooth.
5. In a large bowl, mix together the cooked rice, chopped green onions, and French dressing.
6. Arrange the chicken salad on plates and top with the mango dressing. Serve immediately.
